name: revit-skills
description: Focused Agent Skills for building Autodesk Revit add-ins with Nice3point.Revit.* and .NET.

plugins.name: revit-ui
plugins.description: Build Revit add-in interfaces and user interactions with the Revit UI API.

plugins.name: revit-api
plugins.description: Build Revit model automation with the Revit API.

plugins.name: revit-solution
plugins.description: Build and maintain Revit add-in projects with Nice3point.Revit.Sdk and Nice3point.Revit.Templates.

plugins.name: revit-testing
plugins.description: Write automated Revit API tests with Nice3point.TUnit.Revit.

plugins.name: revit-benchmarking
plugins.description: Benchmark Revit API code inside Revit with Nice3point.BenchmarkDotNet.Revit.

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: Write consistent, well-documented C# for .NET projects.

plugins.name: dotnet-advanced
plugins.description: Design the architecture and runtime composition of modern .NET applications.
